2215050.name: Backrooms Chained Together
2215050.description:
Waking up in the fluorescent purgatory of the Backrooms is horrifying enough. Now imagine doing it chained to three strangers.

Welcome to Chained Through the Backrooms—a brutal co-op climbing and survival experience set in one of the most unsettling universes ever imagined. With only a fragile chain binding your fates, you and your teammates must scale the infinite, distorted layers of the Backrooms and hope you can escape before the corruption consumes everything.

🔗 Chained Co-Op Chaos
You’re physically linked to up to three other players. One person’s slip is everyone’s problem. Communicate, coordinate, or descend into frustration and madness.

🏚️ Backrooms Reimagined
Climb through procedurally generated levels inspired by Backrooms lore—Level 0’s buzzing yellow halls, mold-ridden maintenance tunnels, flooded hotel basements, and things that shouldn’t be.

☣️ Corruption Rises
Instead of lava, a mysterious glitching corruption slowly climbs beneath you. Linger too long, and reality itself will break apart around you.

🧠 Physics-Based Mayhem
Every jump, swing, and misstep matters. The chain wraps, swings, and pulls—sometimes saving you, sometimes dragging you to oblivion.

🕳️ No Checkpoints. No Mercy.
Fall, and you start over. Unless you collect rare anomalies—mysterious artifacts that offer second chances… at a cost.

🎧 Psychological Tension
Dynamic ambient soundscapes and spatial audio cues intensify the paranoia. The Backrooms are alive. And they’re listening.

🧩 Is This a Nightmare or a Test?

Some say those who reach the top wake up. Others claim no top exists at all. The only thing that's certain? You're not supposed to be here. But now you are. Chained, lost, and hunted.
2215050.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
